text:
The Tour d’Argent already boasts a 320,000-bottle wine cellar, a world-famous duck recipe and a storied 441-year history.

Now the legendary restaurant in Paris is about to serve up itsplat de résistance: a front-row view of two of the biggest events of 2024 – the renaissance of Notre Dame Cathedral and the 2024 Summer Olympics.

A city landmark unto itself – and an inspiration for the restaurant in the movieRatatouille– the Tour d’Argent reopened in August 2023 after its own renovation, which preserved revered traditions while adapting to the 21st century.

“It’s very reassuring for many customers to see that such establishments are still present in our history, and in French gastronomic history,” says owner and chief executive Andre Terrail.
title: Paris Michelin-star restaurant that inspired Disney’s Ratatouille, Tour d’Argent, is reborn in time for 2024 Olympics and Notre Dame reopening | South China Morning Post
description: The Paris restaurant that inspired Disney’s Ratatouille has reopened after renovations, offering views of Notre Dame Cathedral and the 2024 Summer Olympics’ opening.
keywords: Tour d’Argent , Paris restaurants, French fine dining, best restaurants in Paris, Michelin-star restaurant Paris, 2024 Olympics, Paris, Notre Dame Cathedral, Ratatouille
